title: helichrysum fulgens
intro: Helichrysum fulgens, also known as the fire helichrysum or red everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum fulgens include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to promote overall well-being.
